title: Social Media Ad Creative Designer — High-Volume, Fast-Turnaround Work (Ongoing)
brief: JOB DESCRIPTION: We're looking for creative ad designers who can pump out high-quality Facebook and Instagram ad creatives on a fast timeline. This is ideal for designers who want steady, ongoing work with room to move from test projects to retainer-level income. The Work: Design social media ad creatives (Facebook, Instagram, carousel ads) Mix of landscape/lawn care visuals, property management, and service-based businesses Fast turnaround (48–72 hours typically) Per-project pricing We're Hiring Like This: We post a test project first ($50 flat fee). If you nail it and we like working with you, we bring you on for ongoing projects at higher rates ($150–$500+ per project depending on complexity). What We're Looking For: Clean, professional design work Quick turnaround Responsive communication (Slack/email) Experience with Canva, Figma, Adobe Creative Suite, or similar Portfolio showing social media ad work (not just logos or print design) Why Apply: Steady work if you're good (we need 10–15 ads per week) Fast payment (typically within 48 hours of completion) Simple briefs, no back-and-forth hell Room to grow (top performers move to higher-paying ongoing projects) TEST PROJECT DETAILS: Your first assignment: Design 3 Facebook/Instagram ad creatives for a lawn care company (we'll provide messaging, brand colors, stock photos). Timeline: 72 hours Pay: $50 flat fee Deliverables: 3 PNGs (1080x1080 square format + 1200x628 landscape format) If we love it, you're on the list for ong
